title: Israel Advances in Lebanon and Seizes More Land, as Hezbollah Fight Escalates
author: Aaron Boxerman and Christina Goldbaum
fullText: The Israeli military said troops advanced to protect border towns from Hezbollah attacks, spurring fears that the government is weighing a wider ground war.
summary: The Israeli military said troops advanced to protect border towns from Hezbollah attacks, spurring fears that the government is weighing a wider ground war.
